name: octane-tsrx-memowall-bench
description: memo-wall bench fixture for octane authored in .tsrx - two 1000-row memo(Row) walls (compiled @for componentSlot arm vs value-position createElement childSlot arm) with window.__renders probes; exposes window.__mount/__tickA/__tickB/__oneChangeA/__oneChangeB/__ctxA/__ctxB for the Playwright harness.
